channel.title: +Articles on काव्ये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on काव्ये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: Sanjay Subrahmanyan 2018 12
item.description: From IE 2018 12. Sanjay as a music icon is not an overnight sensation, but a rare gem that emerged through more than three decades of relentless pursuit of classical music. The Margazhi music season in Chennai during December-January is a unique phenomenon anywhere in India. During the season, the city is abuzz with hundreds of carnatic music concerts from morning till night. It’s a season both veteran and upcoming singers, music lovers, academicians and students of music eagerly wait for.
